Container.Name: genieacs
Container.Overview: Production-ready Docker image for GenieACS, an open-source TR-069 (CWMP) Auto Configuration Server. Manage and provision CPE devices (routers, ONTs, gateways) via TR-069 protocol with a built-in web UI, REST API, and firmware file server. Multi-arch (amd64/arm64), non-root runtime, integrated log rotation. [br][br] Includes 4 services managed by supervisord: CWMP (device communication), NBI (REST API), FS (file server), and UI (web dashboard). [br][br] [b]Requires MongoDB.[/b] Set GENIEACS_MONGODB_CONNECTION_URL to your MongoDB instance. [br][br] More info: https://github.com/GeiserX/genieacs-docker
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: tr-069 cwmp acs cpe router provisioning onu ont
Container.Requires: MongoDB container or external MongoDB instance

Config.Name: CWMP Port
Config.Description: TR-069 CWMP port for CPE device communication

Config.Name: FS Port
Config.Description: File server port for firmware and config uploads

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: JWT secret for web UI authentication. Change in production!
